title: Frogged
description: More frogs and froglights in Minecraft!
body:
This is a simple mod for Minecraft 1.21.4 and above that aims to enhance Minecraft's biomes with more variants of frogs and froglights.

**Frog Variants**
- Poison dart frogs: Spawn rarely in jungles and will poison you if you come too close. Variants include golden poison dart frog, blue poison dart frog, and variegated poison dart frog.
- Sandy frog: Spawns in beach biomes, and can be bred in beaches, deserts, and badlands.
- Sculk frog: Doesn't spawn naturally, can be bred in the deep dark.
